advisor.title: Product Advisor
advisor.subtitle: Find the right cleaning product in just a few steps
advisor.surface: What surface do you want to clean?
advisor.resultsDesc: Based on your selections, we recommend the following products:
advisor.reasonScaleRemover: Specially developed for removing stubborn limescale deposits
advisor.reasonSaniClean: Acidic sanitary cleaner for daily limescale removal
advisor.reasonDeGrease: Powerful degreaser for stubborn grease deposits
advisor.reasonSuperCleanGrease: Universal heavy-duty cleaner for all greasy soiling
advisor.reasonGlassClean: Streak-free cleaning for all glass surfaces
advisor.reasonStainRemover: Specially designed for stain removal on carpets
advisor.reasonStainlessSteel: Specialist care for stainless steel surfaces
advisor.reasonKling: Clinging formula for vertical sanitary surfaces
advisor.reasonWinterinse: Removes salt residues and winter soiling
advisor.reasonPolyLock: For subsequent resealing of the floor
advisor.reasonFoodService: Specially approved for gastronomy and food preparation areas
advisor.reasonSp100: Neutral floor cleaner for daily maintenance
advisor.reasonJet: Strongly alkaline cleaner for stubborn floor soiling
advisor.reasonOfficeClean: Gentle cleaning specially for office environments
advisor.reasonSuperCleanDefault: Universal heavy-duty cleaner for versatile applications
advisor.reasonE10Neutral: Cost-effective universal cleaner for light soiling

about.title: About Us
about.aboutText1: We make your building safer, more efficient, and more comfortable. Whether it's communication, security technology, electrical engineering and installation, or hazard management systems — we are here for you!
about.aboutText2: Our company maintains close and professional cooperation based on extensive practical experience, expertise, and innovative commitment. We offer solutions for your project with manufacturer-independent consulting. This enables us to provide the best product on the market under the best economic conditions.
about.brandText: Our task is to understand the individual requirements of our customers and offer tailor-made solutions designed for the highest quality, reliability, and security. We offer complete solutions for building systems that integrate all relevant technologies and processes — from planning and installation to commissioning and maintenance.
about.missionText: We want to help our customers make their buildings safer, more efficient, and more comfortable by developing and implementing tailor-made solutions for their specific needs.
about.trustDesc: We build long-term relationships based on honesty, transparency, and reliability.
about.expertiseDesc: Extensive practical experience and deep expertise in all areas of building technology.
about.innovationDesc: We rely on forward-looking technologies and innovative solutions.
about.qualityDesc: Highest quality standards in planning, installation, commissioning, and maintenance.
about.environmentDesc: Energy-efficient solutions and responsible use of resources.
about.ethicsDesc: Responsible action towards customers, employees, partners, and the environment.
about.why1: Comprehensive solutions from planning to maintenance

whySwish.title: Why Swish?
whySwish.innovationDesc: State-of-the-art technologies and high-quality raw materials for professional results.
whySwish.environmentDesc: Biodegradable raw materials that meet European and North American standards.
whySwish.trustDesc: Since 1956, companies worldwide have trusted our proven cleaning solutions.
whySwish.serviceDesc: Individual consulting, hygiene plans, training and audits for your business.

aboutPage.trustDesc: We deliver what the customer ordered – on time and reliably.
aboutPage.expertiseDesc: We develop deep knowledge of our customers' facilities and needs.
aboutPage.innovationDesc: We develop products and programs that are simpler, faster, and more useful.
aboutPage.qualityDesc: State-of-the-art technologies and high-quality raw materials for professional results.
aboutPage.environmentDesc: Biodegradable raw materials that meet European standards.
aboutPage.ethicsDesc: Highest ethical standards and respect for all stakeholders.
aboutPage.timeline1956Desc: Swish Maintenance Ltd is founded in Peterborough, Ontario, Canada.
aboutPage.timeline1997Desc: Swish Polska begins as an importer on the Polish market.
aboutPage.timeline2003Desc: Opening of the production facility in Ożarów Mazowiecki, Poland.
aboutPage.timeline2020Desc: Foundation of Swish Deutschland in Kerpen to serve the German market.
